title: Apple acquires video editing company MotionVFX to boost subscribers
description: Apple is buying MotionVFX in part to help the iPhone maker attract more subscribers to its creator tools.
content:
Apple has acquired video editing company called MotionVFX, which offers plugins, templates and visual effects tools that work with Apple's Final Cut Pro.
